zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain於1365年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登時，她的父親Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain21歲，母親Jeanne de Grancey13歲。她於1396年9月27日與Amadeus Commercy結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年在法國享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain于1365年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登时，她的父亲Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain21岁，母亲Jeanne de Grancey13岁。她于1396年9月27日与Amadeus Commercy结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年在法国享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain was born in 1365, in Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain, was 21 and her mother, Jeanne de Grancey, was 13. She married Amadeus Commercy on 27 September 1396. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1423, in France, at the age of 58.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken Landkreis, Saar: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain est née en 1365, à Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Grancey, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Amadeus Commercy le 27 septembre 1396. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1423, à France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain 1365 in Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain 21 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Grancey 13. Sie hat am 27. September 1396 Amadeus Commercy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1423 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain è nata il nel 1365 nel Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Grancey, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Amadeus Commercy il 27 settembre 1396. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1423, nel Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillainが1365年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンで生まれた時，父Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillainは21歳，母Jeanne de Granceyは13歳であった。1396年9月27日にAmadeus Commercyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年にフランスで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain(이)가 1365년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Grancey(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1396년 9월 27일 Amadeus Commercy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 프랑스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain nasceu em 1365, em Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Grancey, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Amadeus Commercy em 27 de setembro de 1396. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1423, em França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain родилась в 1365 г. в местности чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Grancey, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amadeus Commercy 27 сентября 1396 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1423 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame de Louvais Marie de Chateauvillain nació en 1365, en Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Grancey, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Amadeus Commercy el 27 de septiembre de 1396. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1423, en Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
